ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resource" (
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., database, server, cloud storage) */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the resource */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent" (
  "agent_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "agent_version" TEXT /* Version of the agent software */,
  "agent_status" TEXT /* Current status of the agent (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command" (
  "command_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the command */,
  "command_name" TEXT /* Name of the command */,
  "command_description" TEXT /* Description of the command */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data engineer, system administrator) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_metrics" (
  "agent_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the agent collecting the resource data */,
  "command_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the command executed to obtain the resource metrics */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the resource being monitored */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property being measured (e.g., TOTAL, USE) */,
  "aggregated_time" TEXT /* Time of aggregation for the collected data */,
  "property_max_value" REAL /* Maximum value recorded for the property */,
  "property_min_value" REAL /* Minimum value recorded for the property */,
  "property_avg_value" REAL /* Average value for the property over the aggregation period */,
  "property_value_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property value (e.g., Byte) */,
  "property_value_count" INTEGER /* Count of values recorded for the property */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering alerts */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, cleared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id", "command_id", "resource_id", "property_name", "aggregated_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert" (
  "alert_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the alert */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the resource associated with the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_resource_access" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the resource */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, full) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_reports" (
  "report_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the report */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the resource */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
